# Mindhaven

> A free, browser-based, Stardew Valley–style pixel-art game that teaches the
> history of psychology. The player strolls Wundt Way, a single main street
> where each of 14 shops is run by a famous psychologist (Wundt, Calkins,
> Pavlov, Skinner, Watson, Freud, Jung, Maslow, Rogers, Piaget, Bandura,
> Kahneman & Tversky, Loftus, Asch & Milgram). Each shop offers an
> in-character greeting, 2–3 accurate mini-lectures, and an interactive
> activity drawn from the figure's real theory. Progress is gated by an
> "Insight" score and saved locally in the browser.

- All content is original; all pixel art and sound are generated procedurally in code.
- No accounts, no tracking, no server: the game is a static single-page app.
- Ethics-forward framing: Little Albert and Milgram are taught as cautionary
  history; no distress is depicted or simulated.
- Built with React + TypeScript + Vite. Keyboard (WASD/arrows + E) and touch
  controls are both supported.
